# Hello there; welcome 👋🏾

# 👋 Hi, I’m Ayomide

I’m a **Software Engineer** with a strong foundation in **frontend development** and a growing focus on **data analysis and evaluation**. I enjoy building user-facing applications, working with structured data, and translating complex problems into clear, actionable insights.

---

## 💻 Software Engineering

I specialize in building clean, scalable, and user-friendly web applications.

### Technologies & Tools
- React, TypeScript, JavaScript  
- HTML, CSS, Tailwind  
- Firebase, REST APIs  
- Git, GitHub  

### What I Focus On
- Component-driven UI development  
- Performance and usability  
- Writing maintainable, well-structured code  
- Debugging and troubleshooting complex frontend issues  

---

## 📊 Data Analysis & Evaluation

Alongside software engineering, I work extensively with data—especially in **analysis, evaluation, and quality assessment** contexts.

### Skills & Tools
- SQL (aggregations, subqueries, CUBE, ROLLUP)  
- Google Sheets (ARRAYFORMULA, SCAN, BYROW, dashboards)  
- Python (Pandas – exploratory analysis)  
- Data annotation & model evaluation  
- Metric-based quality assessment  

### Areas of Interest
- Data-driven decision making  
- Model output evaluation and quality assurance  
- Interpreting patterns and trends in structured data  
- Building lightweight analytics workflows  

---

## 🤖 AI & Model Evaluation Experience

I have hands-on experience working on **AI training and evaluation projects**, including:
- Text, image, audio, and video annotation  
- Model comparison and response quality assessment  
- Content risk assessment and safety evaluation  
- Prompt accuracy and guideline interpretation  

This work has strengthened my attention to detail, consistency, and ability to apply complex guidelines accurately at scale.

---

## 🛠 Selected Projects

Here are a few examples of what I work on (see pinned repositories):

- **ChatterApp** – A multi-functional CRUD platform for authors and readers  
- **SQL Analytics Projects** – Query-driven insights using real-world datasets  
- **Google Sheets Finance Tracker** – Advanced formulas for automated tracking  


---

## 🌱 Currently Learning

- Advanced SQL analytics  
- Data visualization best practices  
- Python for deeper exploratory and statistical analysis  
- Applying analytics in consulting-style problem solving  

---

## 🎯 What I’m Looking For

I’m interested in roles that involve:
- Software engineering with a data-driven mindset  
- Data analysis and evaluation  
- AI/ML data quality, safety, or analytics  
- Consulting or problem-solving focused environments  

---

## 📫 Let’s Connect

- GitHub: You’re already here 🙂  
- Open to collaboration, feedback, and learning opportunities  

---

### ✨ Philosophy
> Build clearly. Analyze carefully. Communicate precisely.
- 📫 You can contact me by emailing coder6lvck@gmail.com; vaderayomide@gmail.com.
